name: Corn and Cheese Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese (packed, about 2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a standard-size muffin tin with paper liners.
3. Combine the corn muffin mix, milk, cottage cheese, and eggs in a large bowl.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat until well combined.
5. Mix in the shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes.
7. Spoon batter into prepared cups, dividing equally.
8. Bake until muffins are brown on top and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
9. Let muffins cool to room temperature.
